nextToken.description: Specify the pagination token from a previous request to retrieve the next page of results.

s3OutputDataConfig.description: A storage location for the output data in an S3 bucket

bucketOwner.description: If the bucket belongs to another AWS account, specify that account's ID.

usage.description: The usage details in the response from the guardrail.

action.description: The action taken in the response from the guardrail.

actionReason.description: The reason for the action taken when harmful content is detected.

outputs.description: The output details in the response from the guardrail.

assessments.description: The assessment details in the response from the guardrail.

guardrailCoverage.description: The guardrail coverage details in the apply guardrail response.

text.description: The specific text for the output content produced by the guardrail.

stopReason.description: The reason why the model stopped generating output.

usage.description: The total number of tokens used in the call to Converse. The total includes the tokens input to the model and the tokens generated by the model.

additionalModelResponseFields.description: Additional fields in the response that are unique to the model.

trace.description: A trace object that contains information about the Guardrail behavior.

serviceTier.description: Specifies the processing tier configuration used for serving the request.

role.description: The role that the message plays in the message.

content.description:
The message content. Note the following restrictions:

  • You can include up to 20 images. Each image's size, height, and width must be no more than 3.75 MB, 8000 px, and 8000 px, respectively.

  • You can include up to five documents. Each document's size must be no more than 4.5 MB.

  • If you include a ContentBlock with a document field in the array, you must also include a ContentBlock with a text field.

  • You can only include images and documents if the role is user.

stream.description: The output stream that the model generated.

start.description: Start information about a content block start event.

toolUse.description: Information about a tool that the model is requesting to use.

name.description: The name of the tool that the model is requesting to use.

toolUseId.description: The ID of the tool that was used to generate this tool result block.

type.description: The type for the tool that was used to generate this tool result block.

status.description: The status of the tool result block.

contentBlockIndex.description: The index for a content block start event.

delta.description: The delta for a content block delta event.

toolUse.description: Information about a tool that the model is requesting to use.

toolResult.description: An incremental update that contains the results from a tool call.

reasoningContent.description: Contains content regarding the reasoning that is carried out by the model. Reasoning refers to a Chain of Thought (CoT) that the model generates to enhance the accuracy of its final response.

text.description: The reasoning that the model used to return the output.

redactedContent.description: The content in the reasoning that was encrypted by the model provider for safety reasons. The encryption doesn't affect the quality of responses.

signature.description: A token that verifies that the reasoning text was generated by the model. If you pass a reasoning block back to the API in a multi-turn conversation, include the text and its signature unmodified.

citation.description: Incremental citation information that is streamed as part of the response generation process.

title.description: The title or identifier of the source document being cited.

source.description: The source from the original search result that provided the cited content.

sourceContent.description: The specific content from the source document that was referenced or cited in the generated response.

location.description: Specifies the precise location within a source document where cited content can be found. This can include character-level positions, page numbers, or document chunks depending on the document type and indexing method.

contentBlockIndex.description: The block index for a content block delta event.

stopReason.description: The reason why the model stopped generating output.

usage.description: Usage information for the conversation stream event.

inputTokens.description: The number of tokens sent in the request to the model.

outputTokens.description: The number of tokens that the model generated for the request.

totalTokens.description: The total of input tokens and tokens generated by the model.

cacheReadInputTokens.description: The number of input tokens read from the cache for the request.

cacheWriteInputTokens.description: The number of input tokens written to the cache for the request.

metrics.description: The metrics for the conversation stream metadata event.

latencyMs.description: The latency for the streaming request, in milliseconds.

trace.description: The trace object in the response from ConverseStream that contains information about the guardrail behavior.

actionReason.description: Provides the reason for the action taken when harmful content is detected.

performanceConfig.description: Model performance configuration metadata for the conversation stream event.

latency.description: To use a latency-optimized version of the model, set to optimized.

serviceTier.description: Specifies the processing tier configuration used for serving the request.

type.description: Specifies the processing tier type used for serving the request.

internalServerException.description: An internal server error occurred. Retry your request.

modelStreamErrorException.description: A streaming error occurred. Retry your request.

validationException.description: The input fails to satisfy the constraints specified by Amazon Bedrock. For troubleshooting this error, see ValidationError in the Amazon Bedrock User Guide.

throttlingException.description: Your request was denied due to exceeding the account quotas for Amazon Bedrock. For troubleshooting this error, see ThrottlingException in the Amazon Bedrock User Guide.

serviceUnavailableException.description: The service isn't currently available. For troubleshooting this error, see ServiceUnavailable in the Amazon Bedrock User Guide

inputTokens.description: The number of tokens in the provided input according to the specified model's tokenization rules. This count represents the number of input tokens that would be processed if the same input were sent to the model in an inference request. Use this value to estimate costs and ensure your inputs stay within model token limits.

s3OutputDataConfig.description: A storage location for the output data in an S3 bucket

bucketOwner.description: If the bucket belongs to another AWS account, specify that account's ID.

body.description: Inference response from the model in the format specified in the contentType header. To see the format and content of the request and response bodies for different models, refer to Inference parameters.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the inference result.

serviceTier.description: Specifies the processing tier type used for serving the request.

body.description: Streaming response from the model in the format specified by the BidirectionalOutputPayloadPart header.

chunk.description: The speech chunk that was provided as output from the invocation step.

bytes.description: The speech output of the bidirectional stream.

internalServerException.description: The request encountered an unknown internal error.

modelStreamErrorException.description: The request encountered an error with the model stream.

validationException.description: The input fails to satisfy the constraints specified by an Amazon Web Services service.

throttlingException.description: The request was denied due to request throttling.

modelTimeoutException.description: The connection was closed because a request was not received within the timeout period.

serviceUnavailableException.description: The request has failed due to a temporary failure of the server.

body.description: Inference response from the model in the format specified by the contentType header. To see the format and content of this field for different models, refer to Inference parameters.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the inference result.

serviceTier.description: Specifies the processing tier type used for serving the request.

internalServerException.description: An internal server error occurred. Retry your request.

modelStreamErrorException.description: An error occurred while streaming the response. Retry your request.

validationException.description: Input validation failed. Check your request parameters and retry the request.

throttlingException.description: Your request was throttled because of service-wide limitations. Resubmit your request later or in a different region. You can also purchase Provisioned Throughput to increase the rate or number of tokens you can process.

modelTimeoutException.description: The request took too long to process. Processing time exceeded the model timeout length.

serviceUnavailableException.description: The service isn't available. Try again later.
